scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/_tmp.js && mv dist/_tmp.js dist/index.js
scripts.build:bin: bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kond-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kond-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kond-linux-x64
